dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped 125-day (6-month) highest/lowest price lookback to Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper for highest high, dc_lower for lowest low over the same period). Entry triggers on price breaking above the 125-day high; exit triggers on price breaking below the 125-day low. Donchian Channel is the standard technical indicator for this type of breakout strategy.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped 125-day (6-month) highest/lowest price lookback to Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper for highest high, dc_lower for lowest low over the same period). Entry triggers on price breaking above the 125-day high; exit triggers on price breaking below the 125-day low. Donchian Channel is the standard technical indicator for this type of breakout strategy.

source_rule_text: Enter a new long position on a price high above the highest price of the past 6 months (125 days); exit on a new low below the lowest price of the past 6 months.
